   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "from langchain_community.document_loaders import PyPDFLoader, DirectoryLoader\n",
    "from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter\n",
    "\n",
    "# Optional: check current working directory\n",
    "print(\"Before:\", os.getcwd())\n",
    "os.chdir(\"../\")\n",
    "print(\"After:\", os.getcwd())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Extracting data from PDF\n",
    "def load_pdf(data):\n",
    "    loader = DirectoryLoader(data, glob=\"*.pdf\", loader_cls=PyPDFLoader)\n",
    "    documents = loader.load()\n",
    "    return documents\n",
    "\n",
    "extracted_data = load_pdf(data='Data/')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "\"\"\" # Spilt the data into Text chunks \n",
    "\n",
    "\"\"\" def text_split(extracted_data):\n",
    "    text_splitter = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size = 500, chunk_overlap = 20)\n",
    "    text_chunks = text_splitter.split_documents(extracted_data)\n",
    "    return text_chunks \"\"\" \"\"\""
   ]

Detrusor overactivity (urge incontinence)—Detrusoroveractivity refers to uninhibited bladder contractions thatcause leakage. It is the most common cause of establishedincontinence in older adults, accounting for two-thirds ofcases. Women will complain of urinary leakage after theonset of an intense urge to urinate that cannot be fore-stalled.     "import os\n",
    "from langchain_community.document_loaders import PyPDFLoader, DirectoryLoader\n",
    "from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter\n",
    "\n",
    "# Extracting data from PDF\n",
    "def load_pdf(data):\n",
    "    loader = DirectoryLoader(data, glob=\"*.pdf\", loader_cls=PyPDFLoader)\n",
    "    documents = loader.load()\n",
    "    return documents\n",
    "\n",
    "extracted_data = load_pdf(data='Data/')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Spilt the data into Text chunks \n",
    "\n",
    "def text_split(extracted_data):\n",
    "    text_splitter = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size = 500, chunk_overlap = 20)\n",
    "    text_chunks = text_splitter.split_documents(extracted_data)\n",
    "    return text_chunks"
   ]
  },

Detrusor overactivity (urge incontinence)—Detrusoroveractivity refers to uninhibited bladder contractions thatcause leakage. It is the most common cause of establishedincontinence in older adults, accounting for two-thirds ofcases. Women will complain of urinary leakage after theonset of an intense urge to urinate that cannot be fore-stalled.     "tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name, use_auth_token=hugging_face_key)\n",
    "model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(\n",
    "    model_name,\n",
    "    device_map=\"auto\",\n",
    "    torch_dtype=torch.float16,\n",
    "    trust_remote_code=True,\n",
    "    use_auth_token=hugging_face_key,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create generation pipeline\n",
    "pipe = pipeline(\n",
    "    \"text-generation\",\n",
    "    model=model,\n",
    "    tokenizer=tokenizer,\n",
    "    max_new_tokens=500,\n",
    "    temperature=0.4,\n",

    "    return_full_text=False\n",

    "\"\"\" \n",
    "from langchain_community.llms import HuggingFacePipeline\n",
    "from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM, pipeline\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load model and tokenizer (change to your preferred model)\n",
    "model_name = \"mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2\"  # or try \"tiiuae/falcon-7b-instruct\" or \"medalpaca/medalpaca-7b\"\n",
    "tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name, use_auth_token=hugging_face_key)\n",
    "model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(\n",
    "    model_name,\n",
    "    device_map=\"auto\",\n",
    "    torch_dtype=torch.float16,\n",
    "    trust_remote_code=True,\n",
    "    use_auth_token=hugging_face_key,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create generation pipeline\n",
    "pipe = pipeline(\n",
    "    \"text-generation\",\n",
    "    model=model,\n",
    "    tokenizer=tokenizer,\n",
    "    max_new_tokens=500,\n",
    "    temperature=0.4,\n",
    "    do_sample=True,\n",
    "    return_full_text=False\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Wrap in LangChain's LLM interface\n",
    "lim = HuggingFacePipeline(pipeline=pipe) \"\"\""
   ]
  },

    "from langchain.chains import create_retrieval_chain\n",
    "from langchain.chains.combine_documents import create_stuff_documents_chain\n",
    "from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate\n",
    "\n",
    "system_prompt = (\n",
    "    \"You are an assistant for question-answering tasks. \"\n",
    "    \"Use the following pieces of retrived context to answer \"\n",
    "    \"the question. If you don't know the answer, say that you don't know and advice them to a medical professional. \"\n",
    "    \"Use 3 sentences maximum and keep the answer concise \"\n",
    "    \"\\n\\n\"\n",
    "    \"{context}\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages(\n",
    "    [\n",
    "        (\"system\", system_prompt),\n",
    "        (\"human\", \"{input}\")\n",
    "    ]\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "stuff_chain = create_stuff_documents_chain(\n",
    "    llm=lim,\n",
    "    prompt=prompt\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "retrieval_chain = create_retrieval_chain(\n",
    "    retriever=docsearch.as_retriever(),\n",
    "    combine_docs_chain=stuff_chain\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "response = retrieval_chain.invoke({\"input\": \"What kind of medicine should i take for a migrane?\"})\n",
    "print(response['answer']) \"\"\""
